aphids.symptoms: yellowing leaves, sticky honeydew, curled leaf edges, stunted growth, visible clusters on undersides
aphids.visual_satellite_signature: patchy NDVI decline, often starts at field edges
aphids.organic_treatment: neem oil spray 5ml/L, release ladybugs, soap water spray

stem_borer.symptoms: dead hearts (drying of central shoot), circular holes on stem, sawdust-like excreta at holes
stem_borer.visual_satellite_signature: localized spot stress, circular patterns of NDVI drop
stem_borer.organic_treatment: trichogramma egg parasitoids 2.5 lakh/ha, light traps

whitefly.symptoms: silvering of leaves, sootymold growth, leaf chlorosis, vector for leaf curl virus
whitefly.visual_satellite_signature: diffuse NDVI suppression across large zones
whitefly.organic_treatment: yellow sticky traps 50/ha, castor oil coating on traps, neem seed kernel extract 5%

locusts.symptoms: complete defoliation, missing plant parts, rapid field destruction, visible swarms
locusts.organic_treatment: noise creation, trench digging, smoke screens (preventative only)

armyworm.symptoms: skeletonized leaves, large irregular holes, nocturnal feeding, plants look like they were grazed
armyworm.visual_satellite_signature: patchy, rapid progress from one side of field to center
armyworm.organic_treatment: pheromone traps 10/ha, hand-picking larvae at night, bird perches

fungal_blight.symptoms: brown water-soaked spots, white fuzzy growth in humidity, rapid tissue death
fungal_blight.visual_satellite_signature: center-spread NDVI decline, high NDWI correlation

bacterial_wilt.symptoms: sudden wilting while leaves remain green, bacterial ooze from cut stems
bacterial_wilt.visual_satellite_signature: abrupt drop in NDVI + NDWI without defoliation
bacterial_wilt.organic_treatment: soil solarization, crop rotation with marigold, Pseudomonas fluorescens

nutrient_deficiency_nitrogen.symptoms: pale green to yellow older leaves, stunted growth, thin stems
nutrient_deficiency_nitrogen.visual_satellite_signature: uniform low NDVI across entire field
nutrient_deficiency_nitrogen.organic_treatment: vermicompost application 5t/ha, green manuring with dhaincha

nutrient_deficiency_iron.symptoms: interveinal chlorosis (yellowing between green veins) in young leaves
nutrient_deficiency_iron.visual_satellite_signature: subtle patchy NDVI variations, high spatial heterogeneity
nutrient_deficiency_iron.organic_treatment: compost enriched with ferrous sulphate, leaf mold application

drought_stress.symptoms: leaf rolling, wilting, grayish-green foliage, cracking soil
drought_stress.visual_satellite_signature: simultaneous NDVI and NDWI decline, uniform pattern
drought_stress.organic_treatment: mulching with crop residues, life-saving irrigation, hydrogel application
drought_stress.chemical_treatment: potassium nitrate spray 1% to induce tolerance

waterlogging.symptoms: yellowing leaves, oxygen stress in roots, plant wilting despite wet soil
waterlogging.chemical_treatment: foliar urea spray to compensate for root uptake failure

powdery_mildew.symptoms: white powdery spots on upper leaf surfaces, leaves look like they were dusted with flour
powdery_mildew.visual_satellite_signature: increased albedo/reflectance in visible bands, slight NDVI drop
powdery_mildew.organic_treatment: baking soda spray 5g/L, milk spray (1:9 ratio), sulphur dust
